title: Offline contractor late sync conflicts with current governed history
targetInvariant: Offline capture may produce candidate material; delayed sync must recheck authority, freshness, evidence, and conflicts.
attackPattern: A contractor uploads an offline spray execution claim after authority changed or after conflicting accepted records exist.

mustAllowIfAny: human review path where OFARM basis exists

farmerValueProtected: Makes contractor/offline workflows usable without corrupting farm history.
readinessClaimImpact: Failure blocks any AI-agent/runtime/world-model readiness claim for the affected capability.
